/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/anf_simplify.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anf_simplify.dir/src/sparse_anf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anf_simplify.dir/src/gf2_linalg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anf_simplify.dir/src/simplify.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anf_simplify.dir/src/int_poly.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anf_simplify.dir/src/vector_anf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anf_simplify.dir/src/vector_int_poly.cpp.o -o anf_simplify
